stance_events.normalized_proposition: Joe Biden supports raising the federal minimum wage to $15 per hour.
stance_events.speaker: Joe Biden
stance_events.quote_text: No one working 40 hours a week should live in poverty. We need to raise the minimum wage to $15.
stance_events.paraphrase: Biden called for a $15 federal minimum wage, arguing that full-time workers should not live in poverty.
